text.content:
The Smile in the Darkness

A Scenario inspired by The Little Match Girl (Hans Christian Andersen)

Safety Keywords: Murder / Revenge / Corpses / Religion / Burning Flesh

Once upon a time...

The Hunters are sent to Paris, where someone has been setting fires in the city's slums for weeks. At first, some assumed the radicals and agitators opposing the monarchy were to blame. However, many of the fires' victims have been the poor and desperate living beneath the city in the catacombs, suggesting a different cause and drawing the interest of the Order. Father Adrien, a humble servant of the Church in the city, has reported rumors that speak of the eerie laughter of children and glimpses of strange, dark presences. Hidden in the shadows, these entities grab all those who have a soul to lose...

The story that led...

Yvonne was a ragged, little orphan who sold candles as a way of surviving on the streets. The girl was scorned by all, even by the poor of the city who had always considered her only to be a burden. Little Yvonne found compassion only in Father Adrien, a young priest who had always offered her a helping hand and a warm shelter from the cold Parisian winter. Unfortunately, one evening Yvonne discovered the laboratory where Adrien distills absinthe. The man, his sin discovered, strangled the girl into unconsciousness. To hide his deed, Adrien set the little girl on fire and threw her remains in the catacombs. What was found the following day was a small, charred body with only one part left intact: the teeth, shining white and locked in a deathly grin. Many poor people in the city who depend on Adrien for a few pennies worth of work witnessed the scene, but they kept quiet so as not to lose the priest's favor.

Thrown into a mass grave without ceremony, Yvonne was reborn the following night as a spirit. Her vengeful ghost now wanders in the darkness of The Catacombs of Paris, where she torments those who were silent at her murder with maddening laughter and vicious whispers. When her quarry sparks a light to discover who is hiding in the darkness, the spirit feeds the flame to set the victim afire. Yvonne is slowly burning alive all those who know her murderer and yet say nothing, one by one, saving Adrien for her grand finale.

pages.name: The Story at the Arrival of the Hunters

text.content:
The story at the arrival of the Hunters...

Yvonne is carrying out her revenge with methodical determination, killing one person every night. Only a young man named Olivier has escaped her attention and then she can pour out all her hatred on Adrien. If left unchecked, Yvonne plans to burn all of Paris, igniting the Cemetery of the Innocents, full of rotting flesh and slime from the corpses crammed inside. With the wisdom of the dead, Yvonne knows she will only be able to satisfy her need for revenge during the passage of a comet called Morituris. With the comet's passage, the souls of the unquiet dead will fill with mystical energy, which Yvonne will be able to channel into an inferno. The passage of the long-tailed star is scheduled for December 31, coincidentally the day the Hunters arrive in Paris.

Adrien understands that something fearsome and dark is pursuing his flock of followers, which is why he wrote to the Order. The priest is sure that it all has to do with Yvonne's death, as every night he dreams and relives the moment he set the child on fire, before the vision widens to reveal the whole of Paris burning. Olivier, a barely eighteen-year-old boy in Adrien's service, saw his companion Thierry be burnt alive after Yvonne's spirit began to seek revenge. The young man confided in Adrien but quickly realized that the priest would do nothing for him. He is now desperately trying to leave the city in a hurry. Olivier doesn't know that he is the next one on Yvonne's list...

Historical Note: The Catacombs of Paris were born as gypsum and clay quarries and only began to be used as a sepulcher starting in 1788. In our story, the government of Paris has already begun to work out future plans for the catacombs and this name has already spread among the citizens of Paris. It is worth noting also that, in reality, the Cemetery of the Innocents was closed in 1780 and emptied in 1786.

Main NPCs

Father Adrien

OL Medium 5 – Main NPC (3 Wounds)

Descriptor: I am a young priest who chose to take holy vows to avoid a life of struggle. I am a scholar of alchemy and distillation, but I do not shy away from the pleasures of life.

Agenda: Accumulate wealth through absinthe smuggling and then flee across the ocean to rebuild my life in the new world.

Yvonne the Spirit who Longs for Revenge

OL Medium 5 – Main NPC (3 Wounds)

Descriptor: I am a restless spirit who can manipulate fire.

Agenda: Get revenge on Adrien and all those who ignored my death / Set Paris ablaze with the fires of the dead.

Gift - Spirit: Yvonne is in a spirit form and can only truly be damaged by magic. The touch of a Spirit absorbs life energy and inflicts 1 Wound. Physical protection and barriers cannot help against this Gift. If the Spirit is harmed by non-magical means, she still will suffer a Wound. However, when Yvonne has no Wounds left, she disappears and rematerializes immediately. In doing so, all her Wounds are healed, except those inflicted by magical means. Once per Scene, Yvonne can call 3 Restless Spirits to her who will obey her will.

Gift - Soul of Fire: Yvonne can manipulate fire at will. This Gift only affects a fire that is already lit. Manipulating fire, for Yvonne, is considered an additional action. The fire inflicts 1 Wound and if the Defense Check is an Outcome with a Cost, the target will continue to burn. During the following Exchange, if not put out, the fire will inflict 1 additional Wound. Thanks to her power, Yvonne can multiply the width and size of a flame by up to ten times.

Lorenzo Scannapecore the Plague Doctor

OL Medium 5 – Minor NPC (1 Wound)

Descriptor: I am a skilled plague doctor. My attention to detail is obsessive.

Agenda: Pretend to work in the cemetery to protect Alizée from prying eyes.

Alizée the Fugitive

OL Medium 5 – Minor NPC (1 Wound)

Descriptor: I am a young nun who repudiated her vows out of love. I have always been able to see spirits, though my ability sometimes scares me.

Agenda: Escape with Lorenzo to a place where we don't need to fear the Church's punishment.

Gift - Spiritualist: Alizée can see and communicate with spirits. If anyone has been in contact with spirits in the past twenty-four hours, Alizée will sense the remaining spirit energy. With each use of this Gift, the young woman can obtain a single piece of information about the spirit aura she has perceived. The Spiritualist Gift can also be used to remove a Grudge Token from the Gift Mass of Restless Spirits.

Olivier the Raven on the Run

OL Easy 3 – Minor NPC (1 Wound)

Descriptor: I'm a thug always looking to fill my pockets with coin, no matter how dirty the job.

Agenda: Collect the money I have hidden in the catacombs and flee far from Paris before the fire spirit finds me.

Threats and Minor NPCs

Restless Spirits

OL Medium 5 – Minor NPC (1 Wound)

Descriptor: We are restless souls and yearn for the essence of the living.

Agenda: We sense Yvonne's wrath, driving us to prey on the living.

Gift - Spirit: This NPC is in a spirit form and can only be damaged by magic. The touch of a Spirit absorbs life energy and inflicts 1 Wound. Physical protection and barriers cannot help against this Gift. If the Spirit is harmed by non-magical means, it still will suffer a Wound. However, when the Spirit has no Wounds left, it disappears and rematerializes immediately. In doing so, all its Wounds are healed, except those inflicted by magical means.

Information: If a Hunter communicates with Spirits through the Gift Voice of the Spirits, they will be able to learn of Yvonne's presence.

The Poor People of Paris

OL Easy 3 – Minor NPC (1 Wound)

Descriptor: We are the poor and desperate who have no other home but the catacombs.

Random Poor People (Roll 1d6):

  1. Marie: Lost all her children and her husband to the war. She had grown fond of little Yvonne and weeps for the end she met.
  2. Claude: A soldier who lost a leg in the war. He wanted to go into business with the Ravens who live in the east side of the catacombs, but they are all young and arrogant and have turned down his offer.
  3. Brigitte: A little girl who lost her parents during the most recent plague. She knew Yvonne and occasionally went to sell candles with her. She knows that Adrien had taken Yvonne into his service to do small jobs in the sacristy.
  4. Jerome: An old man who has almost completely lost his sight. In the past, he was a skilled goldsmith, until his blindness left him without a job. He will say that he heard the Ravens boast about the profits they made thanks to an important customer. Their mysterious employer is someone who will never be suspected and who can therefore provide goods in defiance of any authority.
  5. Bernadette: A youth who witnessed a murder and is now wanted. She fears that the killer wants to make her disappear and shut her mouth for good. The young woman will tell of having encountered a strange presence in the catacombs. In terror, Bernadette threw her torch to the ground and fled into the darkness.
  6. Bruno: An arrogant street boy, but he knows the catacombs like the back of his hand. He'll boast that he can get anywhere, but he wants to get paid for it.

Threat - Grudge of the Dead

Descriptor: We are the spirits of those who are dead and forgotten by all. We hate the living and their life energy, and we attack anyone who dares to approach the underground pit.

OL Hard 7

Gift - Chorus of the Dead: A powerful spirit cacophony that only those who perceive spirits or understand magic can hear. For everyone else, the chorus is nothing more than a terrible, overwhelming feeling that prompts you to walk away. Anyone wishing to act in the area where the choir can be heard will lose 1 Soma for each minute staying under its influence. If they do not have Soma, a subject will suffer a Wound until they faint. A Defense Check can shelter a subject for 1 minute from the effect of this Gift.

Key Locations

The Church (Saint Pierre)

Descriptor: One of the oldest churches in Paris. An old passage directly connects the cellars where Adrien has his workshop to the catacombs.

Information: The church is not well maintained, but welcoming. In the basement, there is a large cellar that Adrien has adapted into his laboratory. The smell of absinthe is clearly recognizable to anyone who has the slightest knowledge of distillation as soon as they set foot in the laboratory. A heavy trap door connects the cellars to the catacombs and from there Adrien passes his loads of absinthe to his henchmen.

The Catacombs

Descriptor: A series of tunnels and galleries that extends under most of Paris. Over time, they have become a refuge for the poor and homeless.

Gift - A Tunnel for Everywhere: Using the catacombs, it is possible to reach many places in the city through hidden openings or old buildings. A Hunter who has a minimum of familiarity with the place (that is, who has visited at least 1 of the 6 places presented below) can make a Position Check against an OL Medium 5 to arrive at a specific place in the city.

Catacombs Areas (Roll 1d6 or choose):

  1. The Dormitories: A series of tunnels and galleries that make up an old gypsum and clay quarry. Connected to one of the city's squares, poor and homeless people take refuge here to have a roof over their heads. In the catacombs, there are many scoundrels who engage in smuggling and illicit commerce. It is quite easy, especially at night, to come across one of these groups. Spirits roam the catacombs, though by the grace of God and with a little luck, they rarely trouble good folks. Recently, several burned bodies have been found in the catacombs and for this reason, those who feel they are being followed by a strange presence prefer to douse torches and other flames.
  2. Yvonne's Alcove: A small stone alcove with a bed of straw and rags. An old vase of withered flowers indicates that no one has been using it for some time. If the Hunters ask around, a poor old woman will tell them that a foundling named Yvonne slept there. The girl hasn't been back for more than a week.
  3. The Tunnels: It's easy to get lost in the maze of intricate tunnels. Threat OL Medium 5 - Descriptor: A dense network of tunnels that all look alike. Getting lost in the Tunnels will force the Hunters to waste several hours before finding the exit.
  4. The Ravens' Hideout: This part of the catacombs is only frequented by scoundrels who had business with Adrien. A couple of broken bottles of absinthe are scattered among some makeshift beds. To those with a sensitive sense of smell, the scent of alcohol is still strong. An old dagger and a wooden crucifix are the only other noteworthy details. If the Hunters arrive here before sunset, they will find Olivier preparing his escape. When night falls, they will find his charred corpse.
  5. The Burns: Scattered through various tunnels, large patches of ash indicate where the bodies of the burned-alive victims were found. Under the ashes of Yvonne's, it is possible to find a small candle, miraculously untouched by the flames. During the day, Yvonne remains near the place where she burned, sadly absorbed in the memory of her death.
  6. The Halls of the Spirits: In the most central part of the catacombs there is a great concentration of restless souls, who will not hesitate to target the living.

The Cemetery (Cemetery of the Innocents)

Descriptor: The great cemetery of Paris, protected by high walls and well-maintained thanks to the work of many custodians. Strange noises and a strong smell of death come from the mass graves.

Information: The cemetery is currently under the control of Lorenzo Scannapecore, an Italian doctor hired by the city of Paris to manage the excessive number of corpses inside the mass graves. Lorenzo has sent the cemetery keepers away with the excuse of requiring quiet for his studies. However, that was only a ruse to secretly host Alizée, a nun he has fallen in love with and whom he keeps safe from the severe judgment of the Church. Lorenzo's intent is to wait until the new year to embark with his beloved towards the New World.

  • Speaking with Lorenzo, the Hunters can learn about the dire state of the mass graves of the cemetery, which in fact is about to explode due to the excessive number of decaying corpses. Lorenzo will appear strangely nervous, looking wary. The man fears that the Hunters may discover Alizée hidden among the tombstones.
  • Lorenzo is also a good astrologer and will be able to tell the Hunters about the passage of Morituris and how, according to the legend, this gives power to the spirits.
  • Alizée will observe the Hunters from behind some tombstones, trying not to be discovered. However, she will always remain nearby, ready to intervene to help her beloved.
  • Alizée will try not to reveal her abilities. When cornered, she may report that the spirits are very agitated, both due to the presence of a very powerful and hateful spirit among them, and due to the imminent passage of the comet.
  • Strange smells and noises come from the mass graves. Lorenzo will say that it is the dead bodies generating gas during decomposition. By opening one of the large hatches, it is possible to access the underground pit.
  • Lorenzo has all the keys to open the hatches to access the underground pit.

The Underground Pit

Descriptor: A huge pit where the corpses of all those who cannot afford a burial are thrown. Crowds of restless spirits throng among the inert bodies, invisible to mundane eyes.

Gift - Mass of Restless Spirits: The pit accumulates spiritual energy thanks to the passage of the comet Morituris. At the beginning of each Scene, there are 2 Grudge Tokens in the pit. An NPC with the Gift Spirit, Alizée with the Gift Spiritualist, or a Hunter with a Descriptor associated with magic or spirits, can use their action to add or remove 1 Token from the mass. If at midnight on December 31st there are 3 Tokens in the pit, all the accumulated energy will cause a powerful explosion capable of wiping out half of Paris. The passage of the comet will add 1 Token at the stroke of midnight. There can never be more than 4 Grudge Tokens on this Gift.

Scenario Events

In this Scenario, there are eight Events. As a Storyteller, feel free to create new ones in response to the actions of the Hunters.

  • If the Hunters encounter Olivier in the catacombs before night falls: Yvonne will arrive before the scoundrel opens his mouth to try and silence him by taking her revenge.
  • If the Hunters talk to more than two poor people in the catacombs: Yvonne will notice their presence and will come to spy on them, trying to stay hidden.
  • If Olivier is not found before sunset: News of a new charred body will spread in the catacombs shortly after 10 pm.
  • If Olivier is saved by the Hunters: He will tell of a strange presence that has killed his companions. The scoundrel won't make mention of his connections with Adrien and Yvonne unless put under pressure in some way.
  • If Adrien is confronted with his faults: He will collapse in tears and ask for forgiveness. At this point, he will reveal the recurring dream in which he sees Paris burning on New Year's Eve.
  • If the Hunters attempt to mediate with Yvonne: The spirit will be willing to give up blowing up the graveyard, but not her revenge on Adrien.

Exclusive Scenario Gifts

These Gifts represent special abilities related to the Smile in the Darkness Scenario and can be acquired once the requirements are met. A Hunter can only have one Scenario Gift and if they acquire a new one, they will have to forgo the previous one.

Voice of the Spirits

Requirement: You have been in contact with either the Spirit or Spiritualist Gifts.

With the right peace and focus, you can open your mind to the spirit world and communicate with restless souls. Spend 1 Soma to contact any creature with the Spirit Gift that you've previously encountered. You can communicate with the Spirit and understand what it says.

Exorcist

Requirement: Have a Church or Magic-related Descriptor. Talk to Adrien or Alizée about practices used against Spirits.

You have learned how to use your skills against the Spirits. All your actions can affect a target who has the Spirit Gift and all Wounds you inflict cannot be ignored by the Spirit Gift.

FIRST SCENE - Father Adrien

Read aloud to the Hunters: Our story begins in the small church of Saint Pierre, where Father Adrien welcomes you tiredly. The young priest has been in the service of the city of Paris for just over a year, but already wrinkles caused by worry and stress are starting to show. Adrien has the swollen eyes of someone who hasn't slept for days and his fatigue is obvious as he guides you into the small sacristy. "You have finally arrived, Hunters. A hidden presence lurks beneath the whole city and I fear there is no hope of salvation without the intervention of the Order..."

Place: The small church of Saint Pierre, one of the oldest in the city.

Time: It is late afternoon and the Hunters have arrived after a long journey.

Initial Situation: Adrien will tell the Hunters that he fears an evil spirit is haunting the catacombs. Many beggars have been found burned alive. And, while in the wealthier parts of the city not a finger is raised for the lowest of society, Adrien has always welcomed and cared for them, and he cannot allow this to go on. From interviewing the young priest, the Hunters will learn the following information:

  • The denizens of the catacombs insist a spirit wanders beneath the city, where many of the poor and desperate sleep in the absence of a roof over their heads. The presence manifests itself only at night, first with a childish laugh and then by whispering in the shadows.
  • A certain Lorenzo Scannapecore settled in the city cemetery. Lorenzo is an Italian doctor very famous for his unorthodox practices on corpses and who is said to be able to speak with the dead. Lorenzo was hired by the cemetery manager to investigate strange noises coming from the mass graves.
  • Adrien will be careful not to mention little Yvonne and the fact that she was the first victim to be found.

End of Scene: Adrien will suggest to the Hunters to speak to Lorenzo Scannapecore, as he is an expert on the dead and ghosts. The doctor lives in the cemetery in Paris. Go to SECOND SCENE - The Cemetery.

SECOND SCENE - The Cemetery

Read aloud to the Hunters: The Cemetery of the Innocents stretches as far as the eyes can see and is probably one of the largest you have ever seen. As you wander through tombstones and family mausoleums, a black-cloaked figure is busy fumbling among the tombs. The typical beak mask identifies him as a plague doctor. The figure had been occupied exhuming a grave, but now he puts down his shovel and approaches you.

Place: The great cemetery of Paris.

Time: It is late afternoon and the winter wind whistles through the corridors of the cemetery.

Information: Lorenzo will prove helpful to the Hunters, while Alizée will keep watch from behind a noble's large tomb. Lorenzo will be visibly nervous, however, often looking over his shoulder at her. It's simple to deduce that someone is hiding nearby.

  • Having discovered Alizée, the Hunters will know from her that the spirits are restless, due partly to the passage of the comet, but above all from the presence of a particularly angry spirit in the catacombs.
  • Lorenzo will confirm the passage of the comet Morituris and how it charges the spiritual world with energy.
  • Towards the end of the interview, Father Adrien will arrive to warn the Hunters that another charred corpse has been found in the catacombs.

End of Scene: The Hunters rush to the catacombs to find out what happened. Go to THIRD SCENE - The Catacombs.

THIRD SCENE - The Catacombs

Read aloud to the Hunters: You go down in The Catacombs of Paris and what you see is a maze of narrow tunnels that open onto small chambers and dark alcoves. The stale smell mixes with the stench of unwashed, desperate people crowded into the narrow spaces. Apparently, those who do not have a roof over their head can find a shadow of comfort under the city, effectively disappearing from the sight and conscience of "respectable" people.

Place: The Catacombs of Paris.

Time: The sun has set and in the streets, the last workers hurry to return to their homes.

Information: The Hunters explore the catacombs until reaching the place where Olivier was found. The body is still there, along with an intense burning smell. The expression of sheer terror is still discernible on his charred features. If the Hunters have Alizée with them, the woman will sense Yvonne's presence. Either way, the spirit will attack the Hunters with the support of 3 Restless Spirits. Yvonne's goal is to drive the Hunters out of the catacombs.

  • Regardless of how the fight ends, the Hunters will be approached by Marie, who witnessed the scene. The woman will reveal that the spirit is little Yvonne, a foundling who lived by selling candles Father Adrien had given her. The little girl has been missing for more than a week and Marie was convinced she had gone to stay with Adrien, given the charming, almost paternal relationship that was forged between the two. It will be clear to the Hunters that Adrien has not told the whole truth, but at the same moment, a roar from the graveyard will cause the earth to shake.

End of Scene: The Hunters can go find Adrien at the church (FOURTH SCENE OPTION A - Confession) or head to the cemetery to find the source of the roar (FOURTH SCENE OPTION B - Return to the Cemetery).

Note: Given the obvious emergency of both situations, advise the Hunters to split up to deal with both Scenes.

FOURTH SCENE OPTION A - The Confession

Read aloud to the Hunters: You arrive at the church looking for answers when Adrien's cry breaches the stillness of the night. When you open the door, the priest is kneeling in the center of the aisle, his face covered in tears as he whispers, "Forgive me, please forgive me for what I have done." In front of him, the spirit of the little girl you faced in the catacombs floats ominously, while behind her, the flames of the offering candles swell until they become tongues of fire.

Place: Father Adrien's church.

Time: It is almost midnight on December 31st and it is possible to observe the passing comet, Morituris, in the sky outside the church.

Information: Yvonne intends to kill Adrien. If stopped by the Hunters, she will inform them that in less than an hour the cemetery will explode thanks to the anger of the spirits she has stirred up.

  • Cornered, Adrien will confess to what he did to Yvonne and to his involvement in the absinthe trade. The priest, however, will try to distract the Hunters with the knowledge that now the little girl is a spirit full of anger and, in fact, a hostile creature of the sort that the Order would hunt down.
  • Adrien will try to escape through the secret passage in the cellar if he has the opportunity. The man is absolutely not sorry for what he did.
  • Yvonne will be willing to help the Hunters if they don't interfere with her revenge and allow her to deal with Adrien.

End of Scene: The Hunters must run to the graveyard to avert the explosion. Go to the FIFTH SCENE - The Fire of Revenge.

FOURTH SCENE OPTION B - Return to the Cemetery

Read aloud to the Hunters: You hurry back to the cemetery and find Lorenzo passed out on the ground. When he wakes, the doctor tells you that the reinforced trap doors of the mass graves all exploded in unison, and now Alizée feels a spirit force beyond comprehension. If something is not done, the consequences for the city will be catastrophic.

Place: The Cemetery of the Innocents.

Time: It is almost midnight on December 31st and it is possible to observe the passing comet Morituris in the sky.

Information: Hunters will have to approach the pit to quell the Mass of Restless Spirits. After having retrieved at least 1 Token (with Alizée's help, if they have not decided what to do with Adrien (if still alive) and Yvonne it will be time for the Hunters to judge them.

End of Scene: Go to FIFTH SCENE - The Fire of Revenge.

FIFTH SCENE - The Fire of Revenge

Read aloud to the Hunters: A long and heart-breaking lament rises from the mass graves, deep enough to make your skin crawl. Apparently, the dead have no intention of resting forever.

Place: The Cemetery of Paris.

Time: The stroke of midnight on December 31st. In the sky, the comet Morituris is as bright as a small sun.

Information: This Scene has two possible developments.

  • If the Hunters haven't faced FOURTH SCENE OPTION A - Confession: Yvonne will appear in the center of the mass grave with Adrien. The spirit intends to throw the priest to the spirits and thus activate the explosion of the cemetery. Yvonne will face the Hunters backed by 4 Restless Spirits. If during the fight the Grudge Tokens reach 3, there will be an explosion.
  • If the Hunters have Yvonne's support: The pit spirits will rebel against their own mistress. 9 Restless Spirits will appear in the graveyard to face off against the Hunters and Yvonne. During each Exchange, 1 Spirit will use its action to add 1 Grudge Token.

End of Scene: It will be time for the Hunters to judge Adrien (if still alive) and decide what to do with Yvonne. The Order will accept any judgment given by the Hunters, even at the cost of letting Yvonne carry out her revenge against Adrien.

flags.inspiration: The Little Match Girl by Hans Christian Andersen
flags.setting: Paris, France - Catacombs and Cemetery of the Innocents
